channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most An...

item.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
item.description: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on th...

item.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute ‘flash charging.’ But there’s a catch.
item.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: Report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
item.description: The $7 million in annual recurring revenue that Cluely CEO Roy Lee shared last summer was a lie, its founder and CEO Roy Lee admitted on Thursday on X...

item.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
item.description: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE ...

item.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
item.description: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

item.title: It’s Peak Season for Birdwatchers to Spot Migratory Hummingbirds, and Our Favorite Feeder Is on Sale
item.description: Early March is the best time to see rare migratory species in your own backyard, and a smart feeder can help you ID them.

item.title: ByteDance’s AI Ambitions Are Being Hampered by Compute Restraints and Copyright Concerns
item.description: ByteDance’s new Seedance 2.0 AI video model seemed unstoppable—until heavy demand strained the company’s compute capacity and copyright complaints beg...

item.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware
item.description: Italian authorities are making progress in their investigation into a wide-ranging spyware scandal in Italy involving Paragon spyware. But the mystery...
